description: Crystal Raiders Patch 2 (7 February 2024) — Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Frost Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Armors, Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Lethal Crystal League stats are now in the Archive section of a player's personal stats
sections.searchable_text: Changes Lethal Crystal League stats Archive personal stats

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Mimic Frost Staffs Avalanche Hoarfrost Staff Quarterstaffs Rising Blow Armors Mist Cloud Mistwalker Jacket Mounts The Other Side Spectral Bonehorse Unstoppable Sprint Rageclaw

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Mimic mimicking ability cooldown 20% Magic Shock

changes.raw_text: Mimic: Mimicking an ability now reduces the mimicked ability cooldown by 20% (except for Magic Shock)
notes: Mimicking an ability now reduces the mimicked ability cooldown by 20% (except for Magic Shock)

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Avalanche Hoarfrost Staff Snowball Speed 8.5m/s 12m/s knocks airborne 0.8s second activation removed terrain Explosion Radius 4m 5m Stun Effect removed

changes.raw_text: Avalanche: Snowball Speed: 8.5m/s → 12m/s; Snowball now knocks enemies into the air for 0.8s; Removed the second activation — Snowball now only explodes when colliding with terrain; Explosion Radius: 4m → 5m; Removed the Stun Effect of the Explosion
notes: Snowball now knocks enemies into the air for 0.8s
Removed the second activation — Snowball now only explodes when colliding with terrain and can't be activated manually
Removed the Stun Effect of the Explosion

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Rising Blow Damage 50 75 enemy player hit cooldown reduced 12% stacks 3

changes.raw_text: Rising Blow: Damage: 50 → 75; Now for every enemy player hit, the ability cooldown is reduced by 12% (stacks up to 3 times)
notes: For every enemy player hit, ability cooldown is reduced by 12% (stacks up to 3 times)

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Mist Cloud Mistwalker Jacket Duration 6s 5s

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts The Other Side Spectral Bonehorse Invisibility Duration 5s 10s Unstoppable Sprint Rageclaw Duration 6s 5s invincible

changes.raw_text: Unstoppable Sprint: Duration: 6s → 5s; Caster is now invincible during the sprint
notes: Caster is now invincible during the sprint

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where status of Siphoning Mages on World Map Territory UI was not updated for hostile territories
Fixed issue where Ent's Blessing (Ancient Ent) VFX was sometimes invisible
Fixed issue where 'Mists Closing' timer displayed longer than intended when entering a Mists region or Knightfall Abbey
Fixed issue where trading was not possible when two players requested trade simultaneously
Additional minor graphical, UI, terrain, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Siphoning Mages World Map Territory hostile Ent's Blessing Ancient Ent VFX Mists Closing timer Knightfall Abbey trading simultaneous graphical UI terrain localization
